title: Plugin Market
plugin_running_warning: Plugin is running, please disable it first before updating
untrusted_download_warning: ⚠️ This plugin's download URL is from an unofficial domain. It may pose a serious security risk. Please verify the source before installing.
network_hint_proxy: Proxy connection appears broken (for example 127.0.0.1:9). Check your proxy/tunnel port, or temporarily unset HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY and retry.
network_hint_timeout: Network request timed out. Please verify access to GitHub and the plugin market source.
network_hint_check: Please check network connectivity, market source URL, and proxy settings before retrying.
source_invalid: This source URL is not available. Use HTTPS, or http://localhost for local testing.
source_confirm_desc: This source is outside the default market. Review the domain, signature, and checksum before installing from it.
